# Backlog Status

## Status Definitions

Each backlog item must have exactly one of the following statuses:

| Status | Definition |
| --- | --- |
| **In Refinement** | The backlog item is under analysis. The team is clarifying requirements, exploring technical approaches, and estimating effort. It is not yet ready for implementation. |
| **Ready** | The item is fully defined, has clear acceptance criteria, and is waiting in the queue to be worked on. |
| **In Progress** | The item is actively being implemented by the development team. |
| **Done** | The implementation is complete, all acceptance criteria have been met, and the work has been verified. |
